ddls:
CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the software (e.g., v0.10, v0.11) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the version (e.g., Released, Completed) */,
  "eta" TEXT /* Estimated time of arrival for the version release */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the version development */,
  "git_branch" TEXT /* The Git branch associated with the version */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* The commit hash of the last commit for the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the version was last updated */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who released the version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the project associated with the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_released_by FOREIGN KEY ("released_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functional_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each functional update */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version associated with the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the core functional updates made in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the functional update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the functional update was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who created the update */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who approved the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functional_updates_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functional_updates_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functional_updates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the development team */,
  "lead_name" TEXT /* Name of the team lead */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team lead */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the team was last updated */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* A description of the team's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being reviewed */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who submitted the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* A rating for the version (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team working on the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the project was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who created the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release note */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version associated with the release note */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the release note detailing changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the release note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the release note was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who created the release note */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who approved the release note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_notes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_notes_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the role was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who created the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that received the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who created the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who last updated the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who created the notification */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* The date when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
